name: standard-imghdr

metadata.name: standard-imghdr
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Python Software Foundation License

documentation:
Dead battery redistribution
===========================

Python is moving forward! Python finally started to remove dead batteries.
For more information, see `PEP 594 <https://peps.python.org/pep-0594/>`_.

If your project depends on a module that has been removed from the standard,
here is the redistribution of the dead batteries.

modules.name: imghdr
documentation: Recognize image file formats based on their first few bytes.

functions.name: imghdr.what
documentation: Return the type of image contained in a file or byte stream.

functions.name: imghdr.test_jpeg
documentation: Test for JPEG data with JFIF or Exif markers; and raw JPEG.

functions.name: imghdr.test_png
documentation: Verify if the image is a PNG.

functions.name: imghdr.test_gif
documentation: Verify if the image is a GIF ('87 or '89 variants).

functions.name: imghdr.test_tiff
documentation: Verify if the image is a TIFF (can be in Motorola or Intel byte order).

functions.name: imghdr.test_rgb
documentation: test for the SGI image library.

functions.name: imghdr.test_pbm
documentation: Verify if the image is a PBM (portable bitmap).

functions.name: imghdr.test_pgm
documentation: Verify if the image is a PGM (portable graymap).

functions.name: imghdr.test_ppm
documentation: Verify if the image is a PPM (portable pixmap).

functions.name: imghdr.test_rast
documentation: test for the Sun raster file.

functions.name: imghdr.test_xbm
documentation: Verify if the image is a X bitmap (X10 or X11).

functions.name: imghdr.test_bmp
documentation: Verify if the image is a BMP file.

functions.name: imghdr.test_webp
documentation: Verify if the image is a WebP.

functions.name: imghdr.test_exr
documentation: verify is the image ia a OpenEXR fileOpenEXR.
